# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  servicePrincipalName:
    type: string
    default: 'myServicePrincipal'

variables:
- name: clientIDVariable
  type: string
  group: "myResourceGroup"

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
  apiVersion: 2015-07-01
  name: '${uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)}'
  properties:
    roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{SubscriptionID}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c' # this is the Contributor role
    principalId: '${servicePrincipalObjectId(parameters.servicePrincipalName)}'
    scope: /subscriptions/{SubscriptionID}
